value.description: These serpentine xenohumans were originally created by a crime syndicate who used them as entertainers, bodyguards, and assassins.
These serpentine xenohumans were created on an urbworld to act as entertainers on stages at fancy clubs, engineered with unbelievably beautiful singing voices.
Heavily armored serpids with a mass of living snake-like appendages in the place of hair.\n\nAccording to the stories they are ageless and immortal, though in reality they are just incredibly tough.

Greater serpids are said to be proud, tough, and mighty warriors.\n\nSome outlander scientists state they may have originally been humans modified a long time ago in an effort to adapt them to acidic or swamp-like worlds.

Serpid primes are ageless proud warriors who are sometimes believed to possess strange powers. In terms of appearance they are similar to greater serpids, but they typically have a more human-like head and torso.
This loose federation of various serpid gene-lines, former enemies, have united against their more dangerous common foes.
